reconciliation.horizontal: The lossless full-size recheck passed unanimously and was translated to the base A/B order; both pupil screen-X deltas also pass at roughly 31px.
reconciliation.vertical: The dark mask made repeated visual labels unstable, so physical rendered-coordinate evidence is decisive: head and both eye controls have the required negative 000-minus-180 screen-Y deltas, with the eyes moving roughly 29px.
